lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: Baby? Did you not like something I did?

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: What? We were just eating japanese food... why are you suddenly not noticing me.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: HMP! Tell me you're kidding right now...

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: OH! You wanted the shrimp tails of my tempura. Hahahaha!

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: Here baby have my shrimp tails hehe.

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: NO! BABY! JUST NO! It's our anniversary TODAY!

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: I can't believe you would forget something as important as this!

lines.speaker: Cb
lines.text: UGH! How could you forget?! Don't you love me anymore?

lines.speaker: Aj
lines.text: Baby I hear where you're coming from, but I --
